metadata.title: MONAI Ecosystem Audit — 4 Model Adapters + Registry Refactor

child-plan.critical-rules: - MONAI is the standard. Our MLOps pipeline adapts to MONAI, not the reverse. - Any monai.networks.nets.* model MUST be wrappable in under 150 lines. - If wrapping requires more, the ABC interface needs fixing FIRST. - Use MONAI native constructors — ZERO custom architecture code. - Follow the DynUNet adapter pattern exactly (src/minivess/adapters/dynunet.py). - Library-First (CLAUDE.md Rule #3): Use monai.networks.nets.* directly. - TDD mandatory: Write failing tests FIRST, then implement.

phase.name: Model registry refactor
phase.description: Replace if/elif dispatch in model_builder.py with a registry dict. This enables scalable model addition without touching core dispatch.

task.name: Write registry refactor tests
task.tests: - test_registry_contains_dynunet: ModelFamily.MONAI_DYNUNET in registry - test_build_adapter_dynunet: build_adapter(dynunet config) returns DynUNetAdapter - test_unknown_family_raises: build_adapter(unknown) raises ValueError with available list - test_registry_introspectable: Can list all registered families at runtime - test_all_registered_families_buildable: Every registered family can be instantiated

task.name: Refactor model_builder.py
task.description:
Replace if/elif chains with _MODEL_REGISTRY dict. Pattern: _MODEL_REGISTRY: dict[ModelFamily, Callable] = {} def register_adapter(family): decorator that adds to registry def build_adapter(config): lookup in registry, raise if missing
Keep lazy imports inside the registration functions for optional deps. Keep SAM3 VRAM gating logic (_require_sam3).
task.acceptance: All existing model tests still pass. New registry tests pass.

task.name: Add enum entries for MONAI models
task.additions: ModelFamily enum needs: - MONAI_SEGRESNET = "segresnet" - MONAI_SWINUNETR = "swinunetr" - MONAI_UNETR = "unetr" - MONAI_ATTENTIONUNET = "attentionunet"
task.test: Verify enum values are unique and lowercase.

phase.name: SegResNet adapter
phase.description: monai.networks.nets.SegResNet — lightweight ResNet-based encoder-decoder. 4.7M params (vs DynUNet 30M). Good for memory-constrained scenarios. MONAI docs: https://docs.monai.io/en/stable/networks.html#segresnet

task.name: Write SegResNet tests
task.tests: - test_instantiation_default: SegResNetAdapter(config) works with defaults - test_instantiation_custom_filters: Custom init_filters parameter - test_forward_shape: Input (1,1,64,64,32) → output (1,2,64,64,32) - test_get_config_returns_info: get_config() returns AdapterConfigInfo - test_trainable_params_positive: trainable_parameters() > 0 - test_registered_in_factory: build_adapter(segresnet config) works

task.name: Implement SegResNet adapter
task.pattern: Follow dynunet.py exactly: 1. Import from monai.networks.nets import SegResNet 2. __init__: construct SegResNet(spatial_dims=3, in_channels, out_channels, init_filters) 3. forward: self.net(images) → _build_output(logits, "SegResNet") 4. get_config: _build_config(init_filters=...)

task.name: Create SegResNet model profile
task.content-guidance: model_name: segresnet architecture: SegResNet (encoder-decoder) monai_class: monai.networks.nets.SegResNet default_init_filters: 16 param_count_approx: 4_700_000 divisor: 1 (no divisibility requirement) model_overhead_mb: 50 bytes_per_voxel_fwd: 12 bytes_per_voxel_bwd: 24 max_batch_size: cpu: 2 gpu_low_8gb: 4 gpu_mid_16gb: 8 gpu_high_24gb: 16 default_patch_xy: 128 notes: "Lightweight alternative to DynUNet. Good baseline for comparison."

phase.name: SwinUNETR adapter
phase.description: monai.networks.nets.SwinUNETR — Swin Transformer + UNETR decoder. Transformer-based, needs img_size at init. ~62M params.

task.name: Write SwinUNETR tests
task.tests: - test_instantiation: SwinUNETRAdapter(config) works - test_forward_shape: Correct output shape - test_get_config: Returns AdapterConfigInfo - test_registered_in_factory: build_adapter(swinunetr config) works - test_feature_size_configurable: feature_size parameter respected

task.name: Implement SwinUNETR adapter
task.pattern: SwinUNETR needs img_size at init (patch size). Extract from config.architecture_params or use default (96,96,96). feature_size=48 is MONAI default. from monai.networks.nets import SwinUNETR

phase.name: UNETR adapter
phase.description: monai.networks.nets.UNETR — ViT encoder + CNN decoder. Needs img_size at init. ~92M params with default ViT config.

task.name: Write UNETR tests
task.tests: - test_instantiation: UNETRAdapter(config) works - test_forward_shape: Correct output shape - test_get_config: Returns AdapterConfigInfo - test_registered_in_factory: build_adapter(unetr config) works

phase.name: AttentionUnet adapter
phase.description: monai.networks.nets.AttentionUnet — U-Net with attention gates. Lightweight, good for comparison. ~5M params.

task.name: Write AttentionUnet tests
task.tests: - test_instantiation: AttentionUnetAdapter(config) works - test_forward_shape: Correct output shape - test_get_config: Returns AdapterConfigInfo - test_registered_in_factory: build_adapter(attentionunet config) works

task.name: Write MONAI interop tests
task.tests: - test_monai_dice_loss_works_with_adapters: DiceLoss with each adapter output - test_monai_dice_ce_loss_works: DiceCELoss with adapter output - test_monai_sliding_window_inferer: SlidingWindowInferer with each adapter - test_all_adapters_output_segmentation_output: SegmentationOutput dataclass - test_loss_factory_includes_monai_losses: All monai.losses.* registered

task.name: Template adapter documentation
task.description: Copy-paste template showing how to wrap ANY monai.networks.nets.* model. Include: docstring with 5-minute instructions, __init__, forward, get_config. Mark with comments: "REPLACE THIS", "YOUR MODEL HERE", etc.

task.name: Commit and create PR
task.steps: 1. Run: MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 uv run pytest tests/v2/unit/test_segresnet_adapter.py tests/v2/unit/test_swinunetr_adapter.py tests/v2/unit/test_unetr_adapter.py tests/v2/unit/test_attentionunet_adapter.py tests/v2/unit/test_model_registry.py tests/v2/unit/test_monai_interop.py -v 2. Run: uv run ruff check src/minivess/adapters/ and uv run mypy src/minivess/adapters/ 3. git add and git commit (pre-commit hooks must pass) 4. git push -u origin feat/monai-ecosystem-audit 5. gh pr create --title "feat: MONAI ecosystem audit — 4 adapters + registry (#474, #343)" 6. gh issue close 474 --comment "Completed in PR #NNN." 7. gh issue close 343 --comment "Superseded by #474, completed in PR #NNN."
